name: CBD North
description: Central business district north corridor — high-density commercial and government buildings

description: Central business district south — retail, transport hub, and residential mix

description: Industrial zone with manufacturing plants and warehouse facilities

name: Zwelitsha Corridor
description: Transit corridor connecting townships — critical trunk cable route
